title: Samsung Smart Laser Projector Integrated Cabinets
bodyHtml:
Samsung Smart Laser Projector Integrated Cabinets

A Seamless Stealthy Solution for Virtually Any Decor

A simple installation with no need to open the wall or ceiling to run cables. All supporting components can be enclosed in the credenza to provide a beautiful and simple solution.

‍

‍

STYLES

MIAMI – Gloss, Warm White with Black Solid Surface Top

X/SMG7/7D/245MM/GW (LPU7D)
X/SMG9/9D/245MM/GW (LPU9D)

CHICAGO – Black Oak, Grass Texture with Black Solid Surface Top
X/SMG7/7D/245CH/BO (LPU7D)X/SMG9/9D/245CH/BO (LPU9D)

OSLO

X/SMG7/7D/245OS/BG (LPU7D)X/SMG9/9D/245OS/BG (LPU9D)

‍

‍

FEATURES

  • Flush top surface, recessed projector cavity design
  • Extruded aluminum frame creates a support skeleton
  • All supporting components including a speaker system can be enclosed in the credenza to provide a beautiful and simple solution. IR Repeater System required to control projector
  • Pinch-out rear panels to permit fast, easy access to components and wiring
  • Wide variety of bolt-on options and accessories are available
